imaging_location.positioning_notes: Colonoscopia completa hasta ciego con preparacion adecuada. Polipectomia con biopsia.

radiologist_guidance.expected_imaging_findings: Lesion polipoidea sesil o pediculada. Tamano > 10mm aumenta riesgo de displasia. Morfologia velloso o tubulovelloso es mas riesgosa.
radiologist_guidance.meddiffusion_prompt: Abdominal CT colonography, axial view, small pedunculated polyp in sigmoid colon lumen, smooth surface, no transmural invasion, premalignant adenomatous polyp, clinical medical imaging
radiologist_guidance.meddiffusion_negative_prompt: invasive cancer ulcerated mass, advanced malignancy
radiologist_guidance.image_generation_notes: Polipo pediculado adenomatoso de tamano moderado. Lesion premaligna clasica.

notes: Lesion premaligna. Polipectomia es curativa. Grado de displasia define seguimiento.
